ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., KSE100, ALLSHR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date from which the index is calculated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the index values are denominated */,
  "sector_focus" TEXT /* Primary sector or sectors the index focuses on */,
  "weighting_method" TEXT /* Method used to weight the components of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index the data belongs to */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest value of the index in the given period */,
  "current" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest value of the index in the given period */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index value from the previous period */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value from the previous period */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the index */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of trades for the index */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the index movement (0 for neutral, 1 for up, -1 for down) */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening value of the index in the given period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing value of the index in the given period */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Number of shares or units traded */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total value of trades */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Closing value of the index from the previous period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES index_data ("data_id")
)
